name: Tang Dynasty
note: Tang royal family had partial Xianbei ancestry but identified as Han; cosmopolitan — Buddhism, Taoism, Nestorian Christianity, and Islam all coexisted; Confucian exam system perfected

figures.name: Emperor Taizong (Li Shimin)
figures.significance: Considered China greatest emperor; his Zhenguan era is the model of virtuous governance

figures.name: Wu Zetian
figures.significance: The only woman in Chinese history to hold the title of Empress Regnant

figures.name: Li Bai
figures.significance: Greatest Tang poet; defines the image of Tang cosmopolitan culture
